Name: FootIKSetupParam
Description: Determines to Havok parameters to use for foot inverse kinematics (IK) setup.

Fields.Name: Knee Axis Type
Fields.Description: The axial direction of the knee to use.

Fields.Name: Use Foot Locking
Fields.Description: If ON, feet and ankles will be locked.

Fields.Name: Use Foot Ray-cast
Fields.Description: If ON, a ray-cast from the toe is used.

Fields.Name: Apply Height Offset Upwards Only
Fields.Description: If ON, height offset is only applied in the vertical direction.

Fields.Name: Height from Origin to Ground
Fields.Description: In metres.

Fields.Name: Minimum Ankle Height
Fields.Description: The minimum height at which the ankle can be raised. In metres.

Fields.Name: Maximum Ankle Height
Fields.Description: The maximum height at which the ankle can be raised. In metres.

Fields.Name: Maximum Bend Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum angle at which the knee can be bent (cosine value). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Minimum Bend Angle
Fields.Description: Minimum angle at which the knee can be bent (cosine value). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Lowest Ankle Height
Fields.Description: If the ankle is lower than this height, assume they are together. In centimetres.

Fields.Name: Highest Ankle Height
Fields.Description: If the ankle is higher than this height, assume they are apart. In centimetres.

Fields.Name: Ankle Raycast: Upward Distance
Fields.Description: The distance above the ankle at which the raycast occurs. In centimetres.

Fields.Name: Ankle Raycast: Downward Distance
Fields.Description: The distance below the ankle at which the raycast occurs. In centimetres.

Fields.Name: Toe Position: X
Fields.Description: The x-coordinate of the toe.

Fields.Name: Toe Position: Y
Fields.Description: The y-coordinate of the toe.

Fields.Name: Toe Position: Z
Fields.Description: The z-coordinate of the toe.

Fields.Name: Maximum Ankle Pitch
Fields.Description: The maximum pitch (up/down) angle for the ankle. In radians.

Fields.Name: Minimum Ankle Pitch
Fields.Description: The minimum pitch (up/down) angle for the ankle. In radians.

Fields.Name: Maximum Ankle Roll
Fields.Description: The maximum roll (left/right) angle for the ankle. In radians.

Fields.Name: Minimum Ankle Roll
Fields.Description: The minimum roll (left/right) angle for the ankle. In radians.

Fields.Name: IK Error Height Correction Limit
Fields.Description: The clamp value (+/-) for IK error height correction.

Fields.Name: Gain if Height Correction is Enabled
Fields.Description: The amount of gain to apply if height correction is on to reach target height.

Fields.Name: Gain if Height Correction is Disabled
Fields.Description: The amount of gain to apply if height correction is off to reach original height.

Fields.Name: Slope: Forward Lean Ratio
Fields.Description: Specifies the amount of front/back lean against the slope when the slope is tilted.

Fields.Name: Slope: Side Lean Ratio
Fields.Description: Specifies the amount of right/left lean against the slope when the slope is tilted.

Fields.Name: Slope: Forward Lean Ratio during Slide
Fields.Description: Specifies the amount of front/back lean against the slope when the slope is tilted, during a slide.

Fields.Name: Slope: Side Lean Ratio during Slide
Fields.Description: Specifies the amount of right/left lean against the slope when the slope is tilted, during a slide.

Fields.Name: Slope: Gain
Fields.Description: The gain value used for tilting the slope when the slope is tilted.

Fields.Name: Slope: Gain during Slide
Fields.Description: The gain value used for tilting the slope when the slope is tilted, during a slide.

Fields.Name: Slope: Gain Correction from Normal to Slide
Fields.Description: Interpolated gain value when the slope enters a slide from normal.

Fields.Name: Slope: Gain Correction from Slide to Normal
Fields.Description: Interpolated gain value when the slope returns to normal after a slide.

Fields.Name: Minimum Knee Unlock Angle
Fields.Description: The minimum knee angle to unlock foot/ankle when locked. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Maximum Knee Unlock Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum knee angle to unlock foot/ankle when locked. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Knee Unlock Direction Angle
Fields.Description: The angle of the cone to unlock foot/ankle when locked. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Relock Threshold after Unlock
Fields.Description: The threshold of the coefficient after the foot/ankle is unlocked at which it can be relocked.
